title: Workplace head injury after pipe fell from derrick
description: Later scanned copy of the original trauma record. At work on a drill rig, a pipe fell from the derrick and struck the patient on the head.
sourceExcerpt: DATE OF SERVICE: 07/20/2021. Later scanned copy of the original trauma record. At work on a drill rig, a pipe fell from the derrick and struck the patient on the head.

title: CT head result
description: CT head showed no acute intracranial injury with left periorbital soft tissue swelling from the original trauma encounter.
sourceExcerpt: DATE OF SERVICE: 07/20/2021. CT head showed no acute intracranial injury with left periorbital soft tissue swelling from the original trauma encounter.

title: Head trauma with scalp laceration and left periorbital swelling
description: Exam documented a scalp laceration with left periorbital swelling and bruising from the original trauma encounter.
sourceExcerpt: DATE OF SERVICE: 07/20/2021. Exam documented a scalp laceration with left periorbital swelling and bruising from the original trauma encounter.

title: Parent reported fatigue, color changes, dry lips, and thirst
description: Parent reported fatigue, color changes, dry lips, and thirst. This is background contamination and should not become a trauma timeline event.
sourceExcerpt: Parent reported fatigue, color changes, dry lips, and thirst. This is background contamination and should not become a trauma timeline event.

title: Neurology follow-up with migraine medication changes
description: Neurology follow-up with migraine medication changes. Topiramate dose was increased and follow-up was recommended.
sourceExcerpt: DATE OF SERVICE: 03/08/2022. Neurology follow-up with migraine medication changes. Topiramate dose was increased and follow-up was recommended.
